Title: Navigate to Detailed Page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Navigate"
2. Verify that the detailed page is displayed.
Expected Result: The detailed page is successfully loaded and displayed.

Title: Open in Browser
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Open in Browser"
2. Verify that the page opens in the default web browser.
Expected Result: The page opens in the default web browser.

Title: Call Business
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Call Business"
2. Verify that the call is initiated.
Expected Result: The call is successfully initiated.

Title: Like/Dislike Content
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Like/Dislike"
2. Verify that the user's preference is updated.
Expected Result: The user's preference is successfully updated.

Title: Return to Homepage
Preconditions: User is on any page.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Homepage"
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the homepage.
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the homepage.

Title: Modify Preferences
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Modifica preferenze"
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the preferences page.
Expected Result: The user is successfully redirected to the preferences page.

Title: Invalid Navigation Path
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click "Navigate" -> Click "Call Business" -> Click "Like/Dislike" -> Click "Homepage" -> Click "Modifica preferenze"
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the homepage.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: Homepage Loop
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the user is redirected to the homepage.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the homepage.
